name: github-readme-orders-service
title: acme/orders-service README
body:
# orders-service

orders-service owns the order lifecycle (create, fulfil, cancel) and is maintained by the Fulfilment team.

## Dependencies
- Postgres (primary datastore)
- billing-api (for invoice creation)
- the events Kafka topic `orders.events` (publishes order state changes)

## Operational notes
This service is PCI-relevant: it must never log full card numbers, and all deploys to production require a change ticket approved by the Fulfilment on-call. Supported runtime is Java 21.
